variant_name: 高令宁 — 早产难产时
trigger: 陆姝仪失踪事件后，她急火攻心早产并难产，在高家产房经历保大保小的生死抉择。

appearance_delta.face: 脸色比主设定苍白得近乎失血，冷白皮更显透明；额上汗湿，唇色褪尽，眼眶通红，痛苦与不甘交织。
appearance_delta.body: 身体极度虚弱，因生产而蜷缩紧绷，纤秀感被濒危的脆弱取代，但骨子里的抗劲仍从咬牙忍痛中显露。
appearance_delta.hair: 发髻散乱，乌发被汗水打湿贴在鬓边和颈侧，失去平日的规整体面。
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 抓皱床单的手、汗湿凌乱的碎发、血色与苍白并存；即使濒死，眼神仍带倔强，不肯向命运示弱。

costume_override.outfit: 产房中的素色中衣与被褥包裹，衣襟凌乱，重点是病弱与生产现场感，而非正式服饰。

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese noblewoman in childbirth, elegant oval face but drained and pale, cool white skin, red-rimmed sharp eyes, black hair disheveled and damp with sweat, slim body weakened by difficult labor, wearing rumpled ivory inner robes on a traditional birth bed, gripping wrinkled sheets, candles, folding screen, copper basins, medicine bowl, tense dramatic night lighting, painful yet defiant expression, cinematic realism
visual_prompt_negative: modern hospital, medical machines, fantasy healing magic, glamorous makeup, smiling mother, western bedroom, short hair, graphic gore
